---
name: Exploration Program
about: A broad direction that should be researched, decomposed, and turned into tasks
title: "[Explore] "
labels: ["type:scout", "status:open"]
assignees: ""
---

## Direction

What broad direction should the agent explore?

## Desired Outcome

What kind of output or future capability should this eventually enable?

## Current Known Gaps

What do we not know yet?

## Sources / Seeds

Initial links, examples, names, tools, or references.

## Exploration Boundaries

What should the agent avoid? What requires approval?

## Existing Work Survey

The agent should first look for mature tutorials, tools, GitHub projects, templates, case studies, and workflows.

## Expected Outputs

- exploration brief
- capability map
- existing work survey
- reuse map
- candidate child tasks
- decision options

## Notes

Additional context.
